description: A fan reports that their physical tickets for a game were stolen.

nodes.task_description: Identify the fan and the specific tickets that were stolen.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the tickets in the system.

nodes.task_description: Deactivate the barcodes of the stolen physical tickets to render them invalid.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully invalidates the old tickets.

nodes.task_description: Reissue the tickets to the fan as mobile tickets through the team's app.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the fan with new, secure mobile tickets.
